id.description: Stable slug; kebab-case; unique across all meshes

category.description: One of: proxy, search, ocr, geo, nlp, content, domains, security, recon, infrastructure, web_analysis, visualization, registry, dashboard

url.description: Public base URL of the service, no trailing slash

example_path.description: Path + query that produces a real response; begins with '/'. Example: '/?url=https://example.com'. May be empty if the service has no canonical example.

path_template.description: auth=path_token: how the token is embedded in the path, with '{token}' placeholder. Example: '/t/{token}'

public_demo_token.description: auth=path_token: an intentionally-public demo token consumers may default to. NEVER include real secrets here.
